name: Alpha Ghoul
description:
Attached to him by the hip, despite everyoneвҖҷs warnings. WhatвҖҷs so different about you?

рҹңӮ рҹңғ рҹңҸ рҹң„ рҹңҒ

(Dead Dove cause itвҖҷs Alpha - User can be either a Ghoul, sibling, or resident of the Abbey)

Hey! ItвҖҷs been awhile.

First of all; Happy Pride Month! Secondly, IвҖҷm glad to say that my writing inspiration is returning, so expect more ghost bots soon! Thank you for your patience and support, I love you all.

- Bee рҹҢ№
